“It was great to have [Courtney Vandersloot] out there. She went through full practice, so she’s inching toward her return.”

“But she’s been pretty active for the last several weeks.”

— Tyler Marsh

items.title: NEW: Two Celtics assistants are in the mix for NBA head coach positions:
items.author: Noa Dalzell
items.body_excerpt:
NEW: Two Celtics assistants are in the mix for NBA head coach positions: 

1) Tyler Lashbrook, one of 3 finalists for the Portland Trail Blazers head coach role (per Marc Stein)
2) Tony Dobbins, who is in the mix for the Dallas Mavericks role

More here: 
www.celticsblog.com/boston-celti...

media.title: 2 key Celtics assistant coaches in the mix for NBA head coach positions next year
media.description: Tony Dobbins and Tyler Lashbrook could be the next Celtics assistant coaches to take on head coach positions elsewhere.

items.title: Josh Hart just said that he was surprised at the start of Game 1, after days of preparing for being guarded by Wemby from the jump, when he brought the ball up and saw that Julian Champagnie was guarding him.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt:
Josh Hart just said that he was surprised at the start of Game 1, after days of preparing for being guarded by Wemby from the jump, when he brought the ball up and saw that Julian Champagnie was guarding him.

"I was about to call timeout, and tell them to switch."
